changeSet.author: mlopez
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE grscicoll_audit_log ( key bigserial NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, trace_id bigserial NOT NULL, entity_type enum_grscicoll_entity_type NOT NULL, entity_key uuid, created timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by varchar NOT NULL CHECK (assert_min_length(created_by, 3)), pre_state jsonb, post_state jsonb, note text);
